name: patchledger
description: Local-first git patch evidence ledger CLI for reviewable branches.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js write --repo fixtures/smoke-repo --base main --head feature/review-ledger --out /tmp/patchledger-smoke.md && node dist/cli.js verify --repo fixtures/smoke-repo --base main --head feature/review-ledger --max-files-per-commit 4
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
